methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $3M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Robotics & Manufacturing (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Radian Forge is a seed-stage robotics and manufacturing company founded by Jeff Yeager that has raised $3M+. The target operates within a sector encompassing 9 private peers and 1 public comparable (277810.KQ), though a tightly filtered set of same-stage or adjacent-stage peers proved insufficient for conventional median peer analysis—only 11 total robotics and manufacturing companies are available in the comp universe, with none meeting the stricter stage and valuation-tier filters required for statistical reliability.

Given data constraints, stage-progression analysis is the primary applicable method. Using total raised ($3M) as a valuation proxy and applying a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical for seed-to-next-stage progression yields an implied value of $8M. This method assumes comparable dilution and risk profiles across the seed cohort and relies on the validity of historical step-up patterns in the sector.

The triangulation supports a valuation range of $6M to $9M, with a median point of $8M. This range reflects the 15% volatility band around the stage-progression result. Key uncertainties include the absence of same-stage peer validation—the peer-median approach could not be executed due to insufficient filtered datapoints—and reliance on a single quantitative method. Any material deviation from typical seed-stage step-up economics or differentiation in Radian Forge's capital efficiency would argue for movement within this range. A fuller peer set or revenue traction data would materially strengthen conviction.
